title: Job Description Summary
scenario: Summarize a job description for a software engineer position. The summary should be in plain text format and must include at least 3 key responsibilities, 2 required skills, and 1 desired qualification.
constraints: Must include at least 3 key responsibilities
Must include at least 2 required skills
Must include at least 1 desired qualification

evaluationCriteria.description: The summary must include at least 3 key responsibilities
The summary must include at least 2 required skills
The summary must include at least 1 desired qualification
The LLM output must be at most 200 words
